metadata.title: Phesgo and Weekly Paclitaxel
metadata.indication: NCCP breast regimen catalogue placeholder. Full protocol-specific assessment rules require consultant and oncology-pharmacy review.

clinical_governance.prescriptive_authority: Treatment plan must be initiated by a Consultant Medical Oncologist.
clinical_governance.dose_modification_note: Any dose modification should be discussed with a Consultant.
clinical_governance.disclaimer: Catalogue placeholder linked to the official NCCP source. Automated protocol-specific treatment clearance is not yet encoded; use the official PDF and clinical judgement.

output_templates.proceed: Entered values meet an encoded treatment threshold for the assessed component(s).
output_templates.delay: Entered values trigger an encoded delay threshold. Reassess according to the NCCP protocol.
output_templates.dose_reduce: An encoded dose-modification threshold is triggered. Consultant review is required.
output_templates.consultant_review: Protocol card available; full automated rules pending clinical validation.

action.message: This regimen is included as a breast-library placeholder. Review the official NCCP PDF; protocol-specific automated thresholds are pending consultant and oncology-pharmacy feedback.
